name: kairoz-ui
description: Kairoz — a design system for AI and agent interfaces. 180+ framework-agnostic tokens, 50+ component classes, and multi-surface patterns. Agents absorb the system and generate code native to shadcn, Tailwind, React, Vue, or raw HTML.

plugins.name: kairoz
plugins.description: The Kairoz design language as a skill. 180+ tokens, 50+ .kairoz-* component classes, and 8 markdown reference docs covering tokens, components, theming, patterns, responsive behavior, motion, hard-won lessons, and ready-made examples. Agents internalize the system and produce code native to your stack.
